flags.description: Master enforcer switch. Off = subscription.active middleware always allows. Emergency-only.
New Stripe checkouts. Off during Stripe outages. Existing subscriptions unaffected.
AdvanceDunningStageJob execution. Off during payment-provider incidents to prevent unfair suspensions.
ReportMeteredUsageJob execution. Off during Stripe/Paddle metered API outages.
ExpireTrialsJob execution. Off during trial-conversion incidents.
Instant plan swaps. Off during Stripe API degradation.
